title: Program.cs DI Wiring & Endpoints
description: Wire up DI registrations in Program.cs: AddSingleton<IDashboardEventBus, DashboardEventBus>, AddSingleton<IDashboardSnapshotStore, DashboardSnapshotStore>, AddHostedService<DashboardBroadcastService>. Add Configure<AgentRuntimeTuning>. Add GET /api/dashboard/bootstrap endpoint returning DashboardSnapshot. Add GET /api/dashboard/timeline endpoint returning merged journal + log buffer. Reference: blazor-dashboard-improvement-v2.md Section 10, Section 13
